root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_doc_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name (sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.membership_no) as member_name, sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.membership_no, sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_date, sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_code, sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.different_shareloan, -- sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.fund_mony, sc_mem_m_resign.mem_resign, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_old, sc_mem_m_shr_resign.shr_value FROM sc_mem_m_requestment_resign, sc_mem_m_resign, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_shr_resign WHERE ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_code = sc_mem_m_resign.resign_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_shr_resign.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.approve_result <> '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_code in ( '01' )) /*WHERE*/ -- and ( ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_date between '01/01/2018' and '01/02/2018' ) )

r_bysite_ktm_req_resign_01_nest_req_resi.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_loan_resign.contract_no, pka_com_function.fp_form (sc_mem_m_loan_resign.contract_no ,'#-###########') as format_con_no, sc_mem_m_loan_resign.principal_balance, sc_mem_m_loan_resign.interest, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card.backlist_count, sc_mem_m_loan_resign.interest_arrear FROM sc_mem_m_loan_resign, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_mem_m_loan_resign.contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_loan_resign.resign_doc_no = {0} ))

SELECT sc_mem_m_loan_resign.contract_no, sc_mem_m_loan_resign.principal_balance, sc_mem_m_loan_resign.interest, sc_mem_m_loan_resign.interest_arrear FROM sc_mem_m_requestment_resign, sc_mem_m_loan_resign WHERE ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_loan_resign.resign_doc_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_date between '!resign_date_1!' and '!resign_date_2!' ) and ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.approve_result <> '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_requestment_resign.resign_code in ( '01' ) ) )

SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description FROM sc_mem_m_loan_resign, sc_lon_m_contract_coll WHERE ( sc_mem_m_loan_resign.contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_loan_resign.resign_doc_no = {0} ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) )
